binary log with beer.Error write size: 168
slog with text context write size: 254
pure beer.Error write size: 49
beer.Error with foreign error on the tip write size: 49
beer.Error and foreign error intermixed write size: 63
goos: linux
goarch: amd64
pkg: github.com/sirkon/blog
cpu: 12th Gen Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-12700K
